titleStmt.title: SII 23.582: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao

No. 582. (A.R. No. 582 of 1907.) Nandalūru, Rajampet Taluk, Cuddapah District Saumyanātha temple—on the 1st tier of the east base of the same maṇḍapa; right of entrance Kulōttuṅga III. Year 31: 1208-09 A.D.

summary.p: The king is given the appellation ‘who took Madurai and the crowned head of the Pāṇḍya’. The details of the date are given as Śukla, ba. 1, Tuesday, Svāti. Chittirai-Vtshu corresponding to A.D. 1209, March 24, the vishu however being next day. This records a gift of money (due to him as tax from the village on oil and ghee) by Madhurāntaka-Pottappi-Chōḷa Tirukkāḷattidēva for perpetual lamps in the temple of Śokkapperumāḷ at Nirandaṉūr-agaram Kulōttuṅgaśōḻa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, for the merit of his father (ayyajiyar) Manumasiddarasa and (uncle) Nallasiddarasa who, according to No. 578 above was the son of Eramasiddarasa as also was Manumasiddarasa (No, 580).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti siddharājasya caṇḍā dordaṇthavikramaḥ viśvaviśvambharā dikṣā sā dhurandharāḥ . tiruvāykkeḻvi muṉṉuṭaittāka maturaiyum pāṇ ṭiyaṉ muṭittalaiyuṅkoṇṭaruḷiya tirupuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulot tuṅka coḻatevaṟku
yāṇṭu 3 10 1- Āvatāṉa śukla samvatsarattu Aparapakṣattu prathamaiyum cevvāykkiḻamaiyuñ cotiyum peṟṟa cittiraiviṣuviṉpotu maturāntakap pottappic coḻan tirukkāḷattitevaṉeṉ niranta ṉūrakaramāṉa kulottuṅka coḻaccatuṟpetimaṅkala
ttuc cokkapperumāḷukku tiru nan=tāviḷakkukaḷukku Ivūril Eṇṇai yālum neyyālum vanta kācu yeṅka ḷayyajiyar manumacitta racaṟkkum nalla cittaracaṟkum naṉṟākac candrādityavarai cellakkaṭava tāka dhārā pūrvamāka Idharmadānam paṇṇi
kkalveṭṭikkuṭutteṉ Itukku Akutañceytāruṇṭākil kaṅkaik karaiyil Āyiram kurālpacuk koṉṟa pāvattile viḻuvār
Digital edition of SII 23.582 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
